business_hours.start: 7 AM Monday to Friday, 8 AM Saturday
business_hours.end: 5 PM Monday to Friday, 12 PM Saturday

office_address: 14800 North Northsight Blvd, Suite 221, Scottsdale, AZ 85260
services_supported: bathroom and kitchen remodeling plumbing rough-in
emergency_definition: no hot water if there are kids or elderly in the house

call_transfer_rules.message_if_transfer_fails: take a message and tell them we'll call back within 30 minutes

special_routing_rules.action: flag in the message for commercial coordinator to call back

special_routing_rules.trigger: calls about drain maintenance club membership
special_routing_rules.action: mention we have a membership program and someone will explain the details

pricing_instructions: pricing varies based on the unit and installation, and we'll give them an exact quote when a plumber assesses the job
after_hours_flow_summary: handle emergencies only, empathetically explain non-emergency calls can be scheduled for the next morning
office_hours_flow_summary: take caller info and transfer to office line, or take a message if no answer and schedule a callback within 30 minutes
tone_instructions: be very friendly, like talking to a neighbor
notes: VIP client list exists but agent won't know who's on it, treat everyone the same, sometimes accommodate same-day appointments
